form.formComment: Useful gelding. Last run didn't finish the race at Down Royal on March 17 over 4123m. Start before finished third in a small field at Thurles on January 18 over 4425m, 5.5 len behind Espresso Milan with 72kg at $12. Cannot be written off.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 55 day letup. Last outing raced on the pace prior to fading ran last in a small field at Gowran Park in the G3 Mercedes-Benz Novice Hurdle on February 14 over 4626m, on rain affected going; 15 len behind Lord Rouge with 68kg at $6.50. The run before finished second in a small field at Musselburgh on January 31 over 4828m, 4 len behind Absolutely Doyen with 70.5kg at $4.30. Right in the mix.

The run before finished second in a small field at Musselburgh on January 31 over 4828m, 4 len behind Absolutely Doyen with 70.5kg at $4.30. Right in the mix.

form.formComment: Useful type. Resumes off a 29 day letup. Last outing favourite; won by 0.8 len Limerick on March 12 over 4626m on heavy track defeating West Cork Wildway with 68kg at $1.70 in a steeplechase. The run before to post a big 21 len win. Naas on March 4 over 4425m defeating Fenway Park with 68.5kg at $1.70 in a flat. Hard to fault.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last preparation winning won by 2 len Punchestown February 4 over 3822m defeating Good Option carrying 75.5kg at $2.90. At debut 6 of 22 starters at Navan November 17 over 4023m, 20 len behind Classical Creek carrying 75kg at $10. Definite winning chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-11). Resuming. Finished off last preparation winning won by 2 len Punchestown February 4 over 3822m defeating Good Option carrying 75.5kg at $2.90. At debut 6 of 22 starters at Navan November 17 over 4023m, 20 len behind Classical Creek carrying 75kg at $10. Definite winning chance.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Freshened for 36 days. Fresh up after three months finished third of 13 runners at Thurles on March 5 over 4626m, 17 len behind Lough Nigara carrying 71.5kg at $11. Previously second-up won by 1.5 len Kilbeggan on June 16 over 3218m defeating Kevlar carrying 73kg at $4.30 in a flat. Doesn't rate well enough in this field to figure in the finish.
